nasb.text: in the eleventh year of Zedekiah, in the fourth month, in the ninth day of the month, the city wall was breached.

esv.text: In the eleventh year of Zedekiah, in the fourth month, on the ninth day of the month, a breach was made in the city.

cnv.text: 西底家第十一年四月九日，城被攻破。

ccb.text: 西底迦执政第十一年四月九日，耶路撒冷沦陷。
